name: Running Finish
preceding_figure_names: Back Lock, Cross Swivel, Hover Corte, Natural Turn And Back Lock, Progressive Chasse To Right
following_figure_names: Forward Lock, Natural Turn And Back Lock, Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn With Hesitation, Natural Turn, Quick Open Reverse, Fish Tail, Four Quick Run, V6, Tipsy To L, Six Quick Run
notes:
Timing can also be: QQSS
Can be commenced in other alignments, e.g. starting BLOD, ending DC.
Man may turn 1/4 between 1-2 when a facing alignment would be used. Lady would turn 1/8 between 1-2 and 1/8 between 2-3.

steps.action: Back in CBMP, start to turn R, sway S, CBM, rise
Side and slightly forward, pointing to LOD, body turn less, sway L, up
Forward in CBMP, OP, facing LOD, sway S, CBM
